title: The Appointment of Yazid b. al-Muhallab as Governor of Khurasan
description: Governor of Khurasan The circumstances: When Sulayman b. 'Abd al-Malik became Caliph, he put Yazid b. al-Muhallab in charge of military, religious, and fiscal affairs in Iraq. According to Hisham b. Muhammad-Abu Mikhnaf: Upon being given these responsibilities in Iraq, Yazid reflected as follows: "Iraq has been ruined by al-Hajjaj. Today I am the hope of the people of Iraq.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 24
